structure_sections.target_fill: spend a busy day with me

structure_sections.script_template: I woke up at <time> and headed to <first activity>
structure_sections.target_fill: school climbing a startup advisory North Bend research and a networking event I woke up at 7 took a quick shower and headed straight to school for APES and Gov
I came back to a two-hour advisory meeting
with Carthick from Lush Life talking through Presonance a comp neuro ad tool I'm building
It was already about 9 so I headed home

structure_rationale: The structure of the target reel closely mirrors the inspiration reels' sequence—hook, intro, multiple body sections categorized by activities followed by the cta.
content_source_patterns: subject footage during daily activities based on the spoken context
realistic screen recordings capturing activity progress
institutional pages showing subject's academic and professional context

- reel 1: 82.8s, 58 shots, cuts/sec=0.69, text=97%, SFX=136/min
- reel 2: 48.1s, 41 shots, cuts/sec=0.83, text=98%, SFX=100/min
- reel 3: 98.9s, 75 shots, cuts/sec=0.75, text=96%, SFX=116/min
